specs.title: cp-000: Up to 50 messages cached in history
cp-001: Loading spinner during API call
cp-002: Error messages displayed on failure
cp-003: AI responses can include suggested changes to slideblock
cp-004: Apply button to apply a single suggested change
cp-005: Apply to All button to apply all suggestions
cp-006: Applied changes marked with checkmark icon
cp-007: Changes update the slide in the store
cp-018: Sends mode prompt deckId slides data activeSlideId selected block context chat h
cp-019: Response includes message optional suggestedChanges
cp-020: Located in Properties Panel under AI Tools heading
cp-021: 14 AI actions with icons and descriptions
cp-022: Loading spinner on active action
cp-023: Other actions disabled during processing
cp-025: Results applied directly to slide via onApply callback
cp-027: Run Coach button to start evaluation
